공지사항

DashDigital의 새로운 소식과 안내를 확인하세요.

We are incredibly humbled and proud to announce that we have been awarded Studio of the Year. This is a testament to the hard work of our amazing team and the trust our clients place in us.

Expanding our global footprint, we've officially opened our new creative hub in the heart of Cape Town. We're excited to tap into the incredible local talent pool and collaborate with new partners.

After months of internal development, we are open-sourcing our core design system, 'Canvas'. It's built on React and Tailwind CSS, designed to help teams build beautiful interfaces faster.
